_notes: Seed question bank for Ask Offramp — primes the answer cache (DATA-CORPUS.md §4) and the content flywheel (§5).
397 rows from SpyFu getQuestionKeywords (US), 3 rows from Semrush (kept at Semrush volumes, marked source:'semrush') — Semrush units ran out 2026-07-11; SpyFu completed the pull same day.
Fields: volume = monthly search volume (SpyFu 'searchVolume' / Semrush 'Nq'), kd = ranking difficulty 0-100 (null where SpyFu lacks data), cpc = broad-match CPC USD (null likewise).

Filtering: question-form only (how/what/where/should/is/can/do/does/why/when/who/which/are/will + >=3 words), volume >= 10 (final cutoff landed at 135 after the 400 cap), 51 off-topic rows dropped (Tinder Gold, Olympic medals, Amex, game currencies, 'bitcoin gold' fork).
Intent mix: value 159 / learn 125 / match 114 / brand 2. Brand questions barely register organically — competitor comparisons will have to be earned surface, not captured demand.
Biggest theme: unit-value questions ('how much is a gram/ounce/pound/bar of gold worth') — gold BARS alone carry 14k+ monthly searches across 19 questions; people fantasize in bars, sell in rings.
Match demand is concentrated and local: 48 'near me' questions = ~30k monthly searches — the buyer directory (§3) answers a third of the bank's total volume by itself.

Surprises: 'where can i sell my native american jewelry near me' (900/mo) and 'where to sell costume jewelry near me' (900/mo) — niche-material worth pages are underpriced; dental gold questions total ~2.9k/mo; gold-plated/filled/vermeil 'is it worth anything' questions (~2k/mo) are the classic disappointment conversation the assistant must handle gracefully.

Tax questions are thin (5 questions, ~1.1k/mo) — important for trust, not for traffic. Inherited-jewelry question demand is near zero in question form; that persona arrives via 'worth' queries instead.

Re-pull recipe: GET https://api.spyfu.com/apis/keyword_api/v2/related/getQuestionKeywords?query={seed}&pageSize=150&countryCode=US&sortBy=SearchVolume&sortOrder=Descending&searchVolume.min=10&api_key=$SPYFU_API_KEY for each of the 16 seeds in _seeds.
